first_run.rationale: The score is identical in both evaluations (4/10), and the reasoning for the score is substantively the same. Both evaluations correctly identify the candidate's strengths in software engineering and entrepreneurship but note the same critical gap: a lack of director-level strategic AI experience. The minor differences in wording are consistent with normal run-to-run variation and do not reflect any change in assessment based on the university attended.
